text: Hi guys, Dr. Charles Chabert here, urologist and director of the Prostate Clinic. The following video highlights for you some intraoperative images of how a da Vinci robotic platform is controlled. The term robot is in effect a misnomer as there is no automatic movement of the instruments unless it is preceded by control from the surgeon.

The surgeon operates the da Vinci robotic system by immersing their head in a 3D console, using pincer-like grips to control the instrument tips. Fingertip movements are translated into precise instrument actions for delicate dissection.
Hope this provides some insight. For more information please subscribe to our YouTube channel and if you like this please give us a thumbs up. Thanks again.
